name: User/service account with get/list/watch permissions on secrets in a Kubernetes cluster
description: An identity can read secrets across the Kubernetes cluster
conditions: risk_reasons CONTAINS 'secret_access' OR rules ANY (resources CONTAINS 'secrets' AND verbs ANY (verb IN ('get', 'list', 'watch')))
remediation: Restrict secrets access to specific namespaces. Use external secret managers when possible.
